column1: # Use this CSV to pin per-plant reservoir parameters that should NOT be
# computed from the pmax-scaled defaults in the asset mapper.
#   asset_id            stable id emitted by powersim_asset_mapper
#                       Georgian plant name; see mapping CLI preview)
#   reservoir_init      Mm³  — initial storage at hour 0
#   reservoir_min       Mm³  — minimum operating storage (dead pool)
#   reservoir_end_min   Mm³  — minimum allowed end-of-horizon storage
#   efficiency          MWh/Mm³ — energy yield per Mm³ released
#   water_value         $/MWh — opportunity cost floor on dispatch MC
# Blank cells fall back to the per-plant default. Unknown asset_ids are
# ignored (with a warning) so the file is safe to share across fleets.
